---
title: "Rust, the good, the bad, and the ugly"
author: "Geert Jan Bex"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    slide-number: true
    chalkboard: true
    preview-links: auto
    code-line-numbers: false
execute:
  echo: true
  eval: false
---

{{< include 00-learning-modules-overview.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-getting-started-with-rust-projects.qmd >}}

{{< include 02-scalar-computation-and-numeric-basics.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-control-flow-and-program-structure.qmd >}}

{{< include 04-ownership-borrowing-and-mutation.qmd >}}

{{< include 05-data-modeling-with-structs-and-methods.qmd >}}

{{< include 06-reusable-abstractions-with-traits.qmd >}}

{{< include 07-collections-iterators-and-text-data.qmd >}}

{{< include 08-error-handling.qmd >}}

{{< include 09-project-organization-libraries-and-tests.qmd >}}

{{< include 10-randomness-and-reproducible-runs.qmd >}}

{{< include 11-data-parallelism-with-rayon.qmd >}}

{{< include 12-integrated-numerical-example-julia-set.qmd >}}

{{< include 13-integrated-numerical-example-n-body-simulation.qmd >}}
